1: And And cause his face to shine upon us; Selah. Selah.
2: Thy saving health among all nations.
3: Let all the people praise thee.
4: For thou shalt judge the people righteously, and govern the nations upon earth. Selah. Selah.
5: Let all the people praise thee.
6: And And God, even even our own God, shall bless us.
7: And all the ends of the earth shall fear him.
